## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Security

- [ ] Inputs are validated and length-capped where relevant.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or raw private data are included.
- [ ] Tenant/repository scoping is preserved.
